---
title: Examples
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
---

```{r}
#| include: false
reticulate::py_require(c("matplotlib", "scikit-learn", "plotnine", "seaborn", "plotly"))
```

# R

## [`ggplot2`](https://ggplot2.tidyverse.org)

::: {.plotcat}
```{webr}
#| eval: false
library(ggplot2)

ggplot(penguins, aes(bill_len, bill_dep, colour = species)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.75, size = 2.5, na.rm = TRUE) +
  labs(
    title = "Penguin bill dimensions",
    x = "Bill length (mm)",
    y = "Bill depth (mm)",
    colour = "Species"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    plot.title.position = "plot"
  )
```

```{webr}
#| eval: false
library(ggplot2)

ggplot(penguins, aes(bill_len, bill_dep, colour = species)) +
  geom_point(na.rm = TRUE)
```
:::

## [`tinyplot`](https://grantmcdermott.com/tinyplot/)

::: {.plotcat}
```{webr}
#| eval: false
tinyplot::tinyplot(dist ~ speed, data = cars, main = "Stopping distance by speed", xlab = "Speed", ylab = "Stopping distance")
```

```{webr}
#| eval: false
tinyplot::tinyplot(dist ~ speed, data = cars)
```
:::

## [`lattice`](https://lattice.r-forge.r-project.org/)

::: {.plotcat}
```{webr}
#| eval: false
library(lattice)
xyplot(mpg ~ wt, data = mtcars, main = "MPG vs Weight", xlab = "Weight", ylab = "MPG")
```

```{webr}
#| eval: false
library(lattice)
xyplot(mpg ~ wt, data = mtcars)
```
:::

## [`plotly`](https://plotly.com/r/)

::: {.plotcat}
```{webr}
#| eval: false
library(plotly)
plot_ly(data = iris, x = ~Sepal.Length, y = ~Petal.Length, type = 'scatter', mode = 'markers')
```

```{webr}
#| eval: false
library(plotly)
plot_ly(data = iris, x = ~Sepal.Length, y = ~Petal.Length, type = 'scatter')
```
:::

# Python

## [`matplotlib`](https://matplotlib.org/)

::: {.plotcat}
```{pyodide}
#| eval: false
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
from sklearn.datasets import load_iris
iris = load_iris()
data = iris.data
fig, ax = plt.subplots()
ax.scatter(data[:, 0], data[:, 2])
ax.set_title("Iris sepal and petal length")
ax.set_xlabel("Sepal length (cm)")
ax.set_ylabel("Petal length (cm)")
```

```{pyodide}
#| eval: false
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
from sklearn.datasets import load_iris
iris = load_iris()
data = iris.data
fig, ax = plt.subplots()
ax.scatter(data[:, 0], data[:, 2])
```
:::

## [`plotnine`](https://plotnine.org/)

::: {.plotcat}
```{pyodide}
#| eval: false
from plotnine import ggplot, aes, geom_point, labs, theme_minimal
from plotnine.data import mtcars
plot = (
  ggplot(mtcars, aes("wt", "mpg", color="factor(cyl)"))
  + geom_point(size=3)
  + labs(title="Fuel economy by weight", x="Weight", y="Miles per gallon", color="Cylinders")
  + theme_minimal()
)
plot.show()
```

```{pyodide}
#| eval: false
from plotnine import ggplot, aes, geom_point
from plotnine.data import mtcars
ggplot(mtcars, aes("wt", "mpg")) + geom_point()
```
:::

## [`seaborn`](https://seaborn.pydata.org/)

::: {.plotcat}
```{pyodide}
#| eval: false
from sklearn.datasets import load_iris
import pandas as pd
import seaborn as sns
iris = load_iris()
df = pd.DataFrame(iris.data, columns=iris.feature_names)
df['species'] = iris.target
sns.scatterplot(data=df, x="sepal length (cm)", y="petal length (cm)", hue="species")
```

```{pyodide}
#| eval: false
from sklearn.datasets import load_iris
import pandas as pd
import seaborn as sns
iris = load_iris()
df = pd.DataFrame(iris.data, columns=iris.feature_names)
df['species'] = iris.target
sns.scatterplot(data=df, x="sepal length (cm)", y="petal length (cm)")
```
:::

## [`plotly`](https://plotly.com/python/)

::: {.plotcat}
```{pyodide}
#| eval: false
import plotly.graph_objects as go
fig = go.Figure(data=go.Scatter(x=[1, 2, 3], y=[4, 5, 6], mode='markers'))
fig
```

```{pyodide}
#| eval: false
import plotly.graph_objects as go
fig = go.Figure(data=go.Scatter(x=[1, 2, 3], y=[4, 5, 6]))
fig
```
:::
